# CANDIDATE: BEARISH_REJECTION_PM_ONLY_GATE

**Filed:** 2026-05-24
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** quality_gate (time-of-day filter)
**Status:** DRAFT (conditional on AM/PM analysis showing AM underperformance)

## Hypothesis

BEARISH_REJECTION_RIDE_THE_RIBBON signals in v14_enhanced watcher are profitable primarily in the PM session (12:00-16:00 ET). J's 3 winning anchor days all occurred in PM. Excluding AM entries (09:30-12:00 ET) removes low-quality signals and improves OP-16 edge_capture.

## Mechanism

- **Entry filter:** Add time-of-day gate to v14_enhanced watcher
- **AM window:** 09:30-12:00 ET — BLOCK bear entries
- **PM window:** 12:00-16:00 ET — ALLOW bear entries
- **Dedup:** L67 (unique by bar_timestamp[:16])

## Expected impact on OP-16 anchors

| J day | Time | Session | Current | Proposed | Delta |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 4/29 winner | 13:04 | PM | Takes | Takes (PM) | $0 |
| 5/01 winner | 13:09 | PM | Takes | Takes (PM) | $0 |
| 5/04 winner | N/A | N/A | SNIPER | SNIPER | $0 |
| 5/05 loser | TBD | AM? | Skip | Skip (AM blocked) | $0 |
| 5/06 loser | TBD | AM? | Skip | Skip (AM blocked) | $0 |
| 5/07 loser 1 | TBD | PM | Skip | Skip | $0 |
| 5/07 loser 2 | TBD | PM | Skip | Skip | $0 |

**Projected edge_capture:** Unknown — requires AM/PM quality data extraction. If AM signals are noise (WR < 45%), excluding them improves aggregate quality.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** N/A (watcher-only gate)
2. **Sample bias:** v14_enhanced observations — watcher firing criteria may correlate with time-of-day
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (time-of-day split requires walk-forward validation)
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS on top-3 J days (4/29, 5/01, 5/04)
5. **Failure modes:** If AM contains profitable setups (WR > 55%), blocking them loses edge. Regime change (e.g., morning volatility spike) could invalidate.
6. **Concentration:** Unknown — requires data extraction

## Pre-merge gate

- [ ] Extract watcher-observations.jsonl for v14_enhanced bear signals
- [ ] Compute AM vs PM WR/P&L with L67 dedup
- [ ] Validate J-anchor times (4/29 13:04, 5/01 13:09, 5/04)
- [ ] Walk-forward test: IS AM underperformance holds in OOS window
- [ ] Gym validation (if gate affects engine)

## Confidence

4 / 10 — Plausible hypothesis (PM concentration in J winners), but requires data validation. Conditional proposal — only file if AM analysis confirms underperformance.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

- Complements V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE (rank #3) — adds time-of-day dimension to direction filter
- Does not conflict with other candidates
